title: CT5.N03 completed discharge record — Lemma — inactive sites create bounded local witnesses
description: Concrete completed-discharge schema for CT5.N03, the assertion node “Lemma — inactive sites create bounded local witnesses” of tactic CT5 (Local-to-global bookkeeping). It refines the common node-proof record with this node's exact identity, completion state, assigned contract evidence, and any required payload or terminal certificate.

tacticId.description: Framework tactic discriminator for CT5.N03. It must be exactly `CT5`, selecting Local-to-global bookkeeping (bookkeeping) as the tactic that owns the assertion step “Lemma — inactive sites create bounded local witnesses” in the exhaustive proof flow.

nodeId.description: Stable graph-node identifier for the obligation “Lemma — inactive sites create bounded local witnesses”. It must be exactly `CT5.N03` so the evidence, dependencies, outgoing branch, and any terminal result are attributed to this step rather than another node.

nodeNumber.description: One-based ordinal of CT5.N03 within tactic CT5 (Local-to-global bookkeeping). It must be exactly 3, matching the N03 suffix and the node's position in that tactic graph.

status.description: Required completion state for CT5.N03. It must be exactly `proved`, meaning that the node's mathematical assertion or construction has been established for the assertion obligation “Lemma — inactive sites create bounded local witnesses”; another lifecycle value does not discharge this concrete node.

dischargedContracts.description: Contract identifiers whose proof obligations are discharged at CT5.N03. The array must contain `S-Prove`, `S-Comp`; these are precisely the contracts assigned to “Lemma — inactive sites create bounded local witnesses”. Listing an identifier records discharge status but does not replace the matching typed evidence record required in `contractInstances`.

contains.description: Requires `S-Prove` to occur in CT5.N03's discharged-contract list, because this node must use the contract that records the proposition, its assumptions, and proof evidence for the obligation “Lemma — inactive sites create bounded local witnesses”.

Requires `S-Comp` to occur in CT5.N03's discharged-contract list, because this node must use the contract that places the estimates in a common comparison and records the resulting conclusion for the obligation “Lemma — inactive sites create bounded local witnesses”.

contractInstances.description: Typed contract-evidence records that justify CT5.N03 from the recorded branch state. The array must contain at least one instance for every assigned schema: S-Prove (proposition, assumptions, evidence); S-Comp (comparison, comparisonKind, conclusionKind, conclusionRef, evidence). Every instance must include its schema discriminator and nonempty evidence as required by the referenced contract definition; together the records must establish the displayed node statement.

schema.description: Contract discriminator for a `S-Prove` evidence instance at CT5.N03. It must be exactly `S-Prove`, identifying the contract that records the proposition, its assumptions, and proof evidence; the same instance must supply proposition, assumptions, evidence.

Contract discriminator for a `S-Comp` evidence instance at CT5.N03. It must be exactly `S-Comp`, identifying the contract that places the estimates in a common comparison and records the resulting conclusion; the same instance must supply comparison, comparisonKind, conclusionKind, conclusionRef, evidence.

statement.informal: Prove or verify: Lemma — inactive sites create bounded local witnesses

x-obligation.dischargeCriteria: Provide a proof/definition/computation artifact that establishes the displayed statement from the recorded branch state and satisfies every listed contract schema.
